author: bsunanda
body:
#### PR description:

Try to add all the rings in the fine layers of the HGCal Scintillator tiles in the V19 version

#### PR validation:

Tested using the scripts in Geometry/HGCalGeometry/test/python

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Need to be backported to 16_1_X
title: Phase2-hgx366C Try to add all the rings in the fine layers of the HGCal Scintillator tiles in the V19 version
